case_title: SEAN EHTESHAMI ET AL VS. ROAD RUNNER TRANSIT INC. DBA ARROW TRUCKING

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EHTESHAMI, SEAN KRAEMER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ROAD RUNNER TRANSIT INC. DBA ARROW TRUCKING
REMARK: CERTIFIED MAIL TO AGENT OF SERVICE, RETURNED BY POST OFFICE AS RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-22-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS SEAN EHTESHAMI AND DAVID KRAMER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROAD RUNNER TRANSIT INC. DBA ARROW TRUCKING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,155.43 FILED BY EHTESHAMI, SEAN KRAEMER, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT ROAD RUNNER TRANSIT INC. DBA ARROW TRUCKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-23-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS SEAN EHTESHAMI AND DAVID KRAMER ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROAD RUNNER TRANSIT INC. DBA ARROW TRUCKING IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS SEAN EHTESHAMI AND DAVID KRAMER ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROAD RUNNER TRANSIT INC. DBA ARROW TRUCKING IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
